---
title: "Decision Tree & Random Forest Classification"
subtitle: "Big Data Files - Crash Severity Prediction"
format: html
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Load Libraries and Data

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeClassifier, export_text
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier
from sklearn.metrics import (
    classification_report, confusion_matrix, accuracy_score,
    roc_auc_score, roc_curve
)
from sklearn.preprocessing import LabelEncoder
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
```

```{python}
df = pd.read_excel('Data/Big_Data_Files.xlsx')
print(f"Shape: {df.shape}")
df.head(10)
```

## Dataset Overview

```{python}
print("Target (Severity) distribution:")
print(df['Severity'].value_counts())
print(f"\nSeverity = 1 rate: {df['Severity'].mean():.4f} ({df['Severity'].mean()*100:.2f}%)")
```

```{python}
df.describe(include='all')
```

## Preprocessing

```{python}
# Drop ID column
df = df.drop('ID', axis=1)

# Encode categorical columns
label_encoders = {}
for col in ['County', 'City', 'CrashType']:
    le = LabelEncoder()
    df[col] = le.fit_transform(df[col])
    label_encoders[col] = le
    print(f"Encoded '{col}': {len(le.classes_)} unique values")
```

## Train/Test Split

```{python}
X = df.drop('Severity', axis=1)
y = df['Severity']

X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(
    X, y, test_size=0.3, random_state=42, stratify=y
)
print(f"Features: {list(X.columns)}")
print(f"Train size: {X_train.shape[0]}, Test size: {X_test.shape[0]}")
```

## Decision Tree Classifier

```{python}
dt = DecisionTreeClassifier(max_depth=5, random_state=42, min_samples_leaf=50)
dt.fit(X_train, y_train)

y_pred_dt = dt.predict(X_test)
y_prob_dt = dt.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1]

print(f"Accuracy: {accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred_dt):.4f}")
print(f"AUC-ROC:  {roc_auc_score(y_test, y_prob_dt):.4f}")
```

### Confusion Matrix

```{python}
cm_dt = confusion_matrix(y_test, y_pred_dt)
print(cm_dt)
```

### Classification Report

```{python}
print(classification_report(y_test, y_pred_dt, target_names=['Not Severe (0)', 'Severe (1)']))
```

### Feature Importance

```{python}
feat_imp_dt = pd.Series(dt.feature_importances_, index=X.columns).sort_values(ascending=False)
feat_imp_dt
```

### Tree Structure (Top Levels)

```{python}
tree_text = export_text(dt, feature_names=list(X.columns), max_depth=3)
print(tree_text)
```

## Random Forest Classifier

```{python}
rf = RandomForestClassifier(
    n_estimators=100, max_depth=10, random_state=42,
    min_samples_leaf=50, n_jobs=-1
)
rf.fit(X_train, y_train)

y_pred_rf = rf.predict(X_test)
y_prob_rf = rf.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1]

print(f"Accuracy: {accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred_rf):.4f}")
print(f"AUC-ROC:  {roc_auc_score(y_test, y_prob_rf):.4f}")
```

### Confusion Matrix

```{python}
cm_rf = confusion_matrix(y_test, y_pred_rf)
print(cm_rf)
```

### Classification Report

```{python}
print(classification_report(y_test, y_pred_rf, target_names=['Not Severe (0)', 'Severe (1)']))
```

### Feature Importance

```{python}
feat_imp_rf = pd.Series(rf.feature_importances_, index=X.columns).sort_values(ascending=False)
feat_imp_rf
```

## Model Comparison

```{python}
comparison = pd.DataFrame({
    'Decision Tree': [accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred_dt), roc_auc_score(y_test, y_prob_dt)],
    'Random Forest': [accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred_rf), roc_auc_score(y_test, y_prob_rf)]
}, index=['Accuracy', 'AUC-ROC'])
comparison
```

## Visualizations

### Feature Importance Comparison

```{python}
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
x_pos = np.arange(len(X.columns))
width = 0.35
ax.barh(x_pos - width/2, feat_imp_dt[X.columns], width, label='Decision Tree', color='steelblue')
ax.barh(x_pos + width/2, feat_imp_rf[X.columns], width, label='Random Forest', color='coral')
ax.set_yticks(x_pos)
ax.set_yticklabels(X.columns)
ax.set_xlabel('Importance')
ax.set_title('Feature Importance Comparison')
ax.legend()
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

### ROC Curves

```{python}
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 6))
fpr_dt, tpr_dt, _ = roc_curve(y_test, y_prob_dt)
fpr_rf, tpr_rf, _ = roc_curve(y_test, y_prob_rf)
ax.plot(fpr_dt, tpr_dt, label=f'Decision Tree (AUC={roc_auc_score(y_test, y_prob_dt):.3f})', color='steelblue')
ax.plot(fpr_rf, tpr_rf, label=f'Random Forest (AUC={roc_auc_score(y_test, y_prob_rf):.3f})', color='coral')
ax.plot([0, 1], [0, 1], 'k--', alpha=0.5)
ax.set_xlabel('False Positive Rate')
ax.set_ylabel('True Positive Rate')
ax.set_title('ROC Curves')
ax.legend()
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

### Confusion Matrices

```{python}
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 5))

# Decision Tree
ax = axes[0]
im = ax.imshow(cm_dt, cmap='Blues')
ax.set_xticks([0, 1])
ax.set_yticks([0, 1])
ax.set_xticklabels(['Not Severe', 'Severe'])
ax.set_yticklabels(['Not Severe', 'Severe'])
ax.set_xlabel('Predicted')
ax.set_ylabel('Actual')
ax.set_title('Confusion Matrix - Decision Tree')
for i in range(2):
    for j in range(2):
        ax.text(j, i, f'{cm_dt[i, j]:,}', ha='center', va='center',
                color='white' if cm_dt[i, j] > cm_dt.max()/2 else 'black', fontsize=14)

# Random Forest
ax = axes[1]
im = ax.imshow(cm_rf, cmap='Oranges')
ax.set_xticks([0, 1])
ax.set_yticks([0, 1])
ax.set_xticklabels(['Not Severe', 'Severe'])
ax.set_yticklabels(['Not Severe', 'Severe'])
ax.set_xlabel('Predicted')
ax.set_ylabel('Actual')
ax.set_title('Confusion Matrix - Random Forest')
for i in range(2):
    for j in range(2):
        ax.text(j, i, f'{cm_rf[i, j]:,}', ha='center', va='center',
                color='white' if cm_rf[i, j] > cm_rf.max()/2 else 'black', fontsize=14)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```
